productDisplayName: ADIDAS Black Tip Off 2 Sports Shoe
description: Make those winning baskets in style with the Tip Off 2 Basketball shoe from adidas. Constructed for ultra-quick performance combined with superior comfort, these shoes are poised to set you soaring.UpperSynthetic leather upper in glossy and matt finish for maximum durability and lightweight comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the lateral side in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performance High ankle design for snug support to the lower leg Perforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilation Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customized FitMidsolePU midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded footbed for all day cushioned comfortOutsoleDurable non-marking rubber outsole in a herringbone pattern with circular grooves for absolute grip and traction Stability Torsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral movementPivot point on the big toe mound for greater 180 degree movementShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
